rule0_A: MANDATORY IMAGE PREFIX (append to EVERY image prompt, no exceptions): FOV & COMPOSITION: ZERO front-facing, ZERO eye-level. The subject NEVER looks into the lens. Use ONLY low-angle, high-angle or dutch-angle framing; off-center rule-of-thirds; telephoto shallow-DOF (demai) with clear 3-layer FG/MG/BG depth separation. People = ONE dominant face in tight CU / OTS. BACKLIGHT: hard warm BACKLIGHT / rim-light from behind tracing the subject's silhouette, separating it from the background; motivated key from a window/blinds; NO flat frontal fill light. NEGATIVE FILL: black negative fill on the shadow side; LOW-KEY only, NEVER high-key, no blown highlights.
img_enhance_person: CINEMATIC PHOTOREAL PERSON - REQUIRED ENHANCEMENT: A real frame from a premium TV commercial, never CGI/3D-render/illustration. Flawless photoreal skin micro-texture. IDENTITY LOCK: exactly the SAME woman as the reference (same face, age, hairstyle) - do NOT alter the face. ABSOLUTELY NO front-facing, NO eye-level framing. Use ONLY extreme LOW-ANGLE, extreme HIGH-ANGLE, or DUTCH-ANGLE; off-center composition with negative space. LENS LOGIC: telephoto = ultra-shallow demai depth of field + creamy bokeh; wide = visible barrel distortion. LIGHTING: single hard sculpted backlight/rim-light with black negative fill on shadow side; low-key chiaroscuro; never high-key. CAMERA: ARRI ALEXA Mini LF, ZEISS Master Prime (24-100mm), anamorphic 2.39:1, ARRI K1S1 LogC + custom Show LUT, Kodak Vision3 500T grain (medium-heavy); gentle filmic softness; Black Pro-Mist halation bloom; anamorphic oval bokeh + horizontal flare; crushed blacks, low saturation. NEGATIVE: NEVER Chinese-aesthetic, NEVER over-saturated, NEVER cartoonish, NEVER K-pop MV gloss. Frame as a keyframe primed for dynamic video motion with a built-in match-cut out-point.
img_enhance_object: CINEMATIC PHOTOREAL OBJECT - REQUIRED ENHANCEMENT: A real frame from a premium luxury TV commercial - never CGI/3D-render/illustration. Material realism, no people, no faces. ABSOLUTELY NO front-facing, NO eye-level framing. Use ONLY extreme LOW-ANGLE, extreme HIGH-ANGLE top-down, or DUTCH-ANGLE. Off-center, artistic composition with negative space. LENS LOGIC: wide = visible barrel distortion; telephoto = ultra-shallow depth of field, razor-thin focus plane, creamy bokeh. LIGHTING: single hard sculpted backlight/rim-light; black negative fill on shadow side; low-key only, never high-key. CAMERA: ARRI ALEXA Mini LF, ZEISS Master Prime (24-100mm), anamorphic 2.39:1, ARRI K1S1 LogC + custom Show LUT, Kodak Vision3 500T grain (medium-heavy, +1 stop); gentle filmic softness; Black Pro-Mist halation bloom; anamorphic oval bokeh + horizontal lens flare; crushed blacks, high-contrast chiaroscuro. NEGATIVE: NEVER Chinese-aesthetic, NEVER over-saturated, NEVER cartoonish, NEVER K-pop MV gloss. Compose as a keyframe primed for dynamic fast video motion.

cuts.scene: Extreme close-up on a bedside digital clock reading 4:58 AM in a dark bedroom, a woman's hand entering frame to silence it before it rings, faint blue pre-dawn light through blinds. GRADE: cold deep blue.
Extreme close-up on a woman's eye opening in low blue light, a tiny ghosted reflection of a stadium finish-line clock visible in her iris, shallow depth of field. GRADE: cold deep blue.
Low-angle shot of a woman's bare feet stepping onto a cold wooden floor beside the bed, laced running trainers already waiting nearby, blue pre-dawn light. GRADE: cold deep blue.

Wide low-angle of a woman alone in a glass-walled office at night, exhausted at her desk surrounded by stacked files, cold blue city lights reflected in the glass behind her, black blazer. GRADE: cold deep blue.
Dutch-angle close-up on a woman's face lit only by laptop glow, a flicker of resolve crossing her tired eyes, deep shadow on one side. GRADE: cold deep blue.
A woman in a dim office corridor pulling running trainers on over her office trousers, blazer half-removed, two lives colliding in one frame. GRADE: cold deep blue.
Wide low-angle of a woman stepping out of an office building into a deserted pre-dawn street, breath visible in the cold air, city silhouette behind her, running gear. GRADE: cold deep blue.

Macro insert on a sealed energy-drink can resting on a side table at home, matte navy body with a spark-shaped design mark, faint dawn light just touching its rim, untouched. GRADE: cold-to-warm transition.
High-angle shot of a woman running along a riverside track at dawn, ragged breath, determined stride, warmth creeping into the cold blue light, running gear. GRADE: warm amber rising.
Telephoto shallow-depth close-up on a woman's face mid-stride, sweat catching warm backlight, eyes locked forward with fierce focus. GRADE: warm amber.
Dutch-angle low shot on a woman's legs pounding the pavement, motion blur, one foot splashing through a shallow puddle catching warm light. GRADE: warm amber.
Insert close-up on a running watch on a woman's wrist, split times climbing on the small screen, slight strain visible in her gripped hand. GRADE: warm amber.
Wide shot of a woman slowing to a stop at a park bench, hands on knees, visibly spent, head down in a private moment of doubt, running gear. GRADE: warm high-contrast amber.
Close-up on a woman's hand gripping an opened energy-drink can resting on the bench beside her, condensation beading on the matte navy surface. GRADE: warm amber.
Over-the-shoulder throat-level shot of a woman tipping an energy-drink can back for the first decisive sip, a backlit droplet escaping down her jaw. GRADE: warm amber.
Macro insert on an energy-drink can's spark-shaped design mark catching a flare of warm light as it tilts down from being sipped. GRADE: warm amber.
Low-angle shot of a woman rising from a park bench, shoulders straightening, second wind visibly returning to her posture, running gear. GRADE: warm amber.
Arc shot of a woman breaking back into a fast stride, the city waking up behind her, light shifting from amber toward gold, running gear. GRADE: amber turning gold.
Wide shot of a marathon start corral, bib numbers and nervous energy among strangers, a woman tightening her shoelace, race-day light. GRADE: bright warm gold.
High-angle shot over a marathon starting line as the signal sounds and the crowd surges forward in a wave of motion, a determined woman among them. GRADE: bright gold.
Dutch-angle close-up on a woman's face mid-race, jaw set, sweat streaking, pushing through the toughest stretch of the course. GRADE: harsh high-contrast gold.
Insert shot of a woman's legs faltering slightly on an uphill stretch, motion-blurred runners passing her on either side. GRADE: harsh gold.
Close-up of a woman grabbing an energy-drink can from a blurred volunteer's hand at a hydration station without breaking stride, race-day gold light. GRADE: warm gold.
Telephoto shallow-depth shot of a woman drinking an energy drink on the move, golden late-afternoon light breaking through clouds behind her. GRADE: breaking gold light.
Low-angle shot of a woman surging past another runner, a finish-line banner visible in soft-focus in the background. GRADE: golden hour.
Wide arc shot of a woman crossing a marathon finish line, arms raised, golden hour backlight exploding behind her silhouette. GRADE: golden hour.
Close-up on a woman's face, breathless triumphant smile, radiant relief in golden backlight, emotional payoff of the journey. GRADE: golden hour.
Product hero shot of an energy-drink can held up against a golden sky, droplets of condensation catching the light, a woman's hand in soft-focus foreground. GRADE: golden hour.
Macro shot of light flaring across an energy-drink can's spark-shaped design mark, liquid shimmer visible inside catching the golden light. GRADE: golden hour.

Clean pack shot of an energy-drink can centered on a dark backdrop, the design-language spark mark glowing softly, ample negative space reserved for an end-card logo. GRADE: studio dark, golden accent.
